name: Open WebUI
longDescription:
Open WebUI is a user-friendly, self-hosted AI interface that supports Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs. It provides a ChatGPT-like experience for your own local or remote language models.

Features include multi-user support with role-based access, document chat (RAG), web search integration, model management, and a rich plugin ecosystem. Connects to Ollama, OpenAI, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
description: A self-hosted AI interface supporting Ollama, OpenAI API, and more.
